Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Description: Reads your Doman Mahjong hand and either suggests the best discard or plays the match for you.
Changelog: v0.1.2.0: Push/fold policy now decides on expected value rather than shanten gates, sitting on a broader opponent danger and value model. EfficiencyPolicy and the heuristic call policy honor the active ruleset (Doman vs Riichi) for Tsumo and yaku checks, and the stuck state where declining a kan at state-6 silently swallowed the turn now falls through to a discard. Yaku coverage and TargetHan have been widened so the value head sees more of the legal yaku surface. AutoPlay fixes: hand-result modal advances via a real ButtonClick event with a stability window, Tsumo routes through opcode 11 (SelectItem), Chi accept collapses to a single button slot, the snapshot cache clears when the addon goes away, and the out-of-sync hand path can unstick itself. Tuner threads the ruleset through every run and emits strategy diagnostics for loss-mode analysis. Track 0 fixture corpus lands with state-15 pon-offer and EmjL state-30 our-turn-discard seeds, plus a memdump-to-fixture extraction tool. UI: header icons embedded in the Mode card, Spotlight highlight style dropped. Internal: LayoutProfile threaded through InputDispatcher, a pure BuildSnapshotFromMemory entry on BaseEmjVariant, and CI auto-refreshes the issue-template plugin-version dropdowns on release.
